plan.headline: What is OpenClaw?
plan.caption: Jarvis is powered by OpenClaw (the agent orchestration engine that schedules and runs all your AI tasks) and Claude by Anthropic (the AI that reads, writes and makes decisions). Two tools. One business that runs itself. 🦾🤖
plan.facebook_caption:
A lot of people ask: what's actually powering Jarvis?

Two things:

🦾 OpenClaw — the agent orchestration engine. It runs on your hardware, schedules all 10 agents, manages what runs when, and handles the automation pipelines. Think of it as the operations manager.

🤖 Claude by Anthropic — the AI brain. It reads your emails, writes your content, monitors your ads, and makes intelligent decisions. Think of it as the smart staff member.

We use both of these same tools to run our own business at ImproveYourSite. When you buy Jarvis, you're getting the exact same setup — configured for your business.

You get a Claude API key directly from Anthropic. They bill you directly ($10–30/month typically). We don't touch your billing.

$250. improveyoursite.com/jarvis 🦾🤖
